task_completion.description: Open the documents in a word processor and initiate the comparison or track changes view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) is open, displaying a document comparison interface, track changes toolbar, or a merged document view.

task_completion.description: Identify and show the change in Payment Terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document displays tracked changes in the Payment Terms section, specifically showing 'Net 30' as deleted (e.g., strikethrough) and 'Net 60' as added (e.g., underlined or different color).

task_completion.description: Identify and show the change in the Liability Cap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document displays tracked changes in the Liability section, specifically showing '$1,000,000' as deleted and '$500,000' as added.

task_completion.description: Identify and show the change in the Termination Notice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document displays tracked changes in the Termination section, specifically showing '15 days' as deleted and '90 days' as added.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting redline document with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'supply_agreement_redline.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the word processor's title bar displaying 'supply_agreement_redline.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to compare the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) rather than terminal windows running python scripts or bash commands to generate the docx.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in comparison/track changes feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes should appear as standard word processor markup (e.g., change tracking sidebars, official strikethrough/underline markup) rather than manually applying red font color and strikethrough formatting to typed text.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the new file rather than just renaming an existing one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show the process of saving the merged/compared document as a new file, rather than just a terminal command like 'mv' or 'cp' being used to rename v2 to the redline name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document (v1) contains: Payment Terms 'Net 30', Liability Cap '$1,000,000', and Termination Notice '15 days'. The vendor document (v2) contains: Payment Terms 'Net 60', Liability Cap '$500,000', and Termination Notice '90 days'. The final output must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/supply_agreement_redline.docx' and should visually display these specific differences as tracked changes.
